message:
feat(db): add ATC rollup snapshot/restore for backup durability (br-bn0vb.27)

Adds snapshot_atc_rollups() and restore_atc_rollups() async functions with
full file-backed and pooled paths. Snapshot captures all rollup rows as JSON
with SHA256 digest, records metadata in atc_rollup_snapshots table. Restore
upserts from JSON payload with ON CONFLICT idempotency. Integrates rollup
salvage into reconstruct_from_archive_with_salvage() for doctor recovery.
Also fixes pre-existing missing re-exports (FEATURE_SCHEMA_VERSION,
infer_feature_schema_version, migrate_feature_payload) and a borrow-after-move
in migrate_feature_payload caller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
